hooks.description: Pre-commit lint + typecheck. Stdin: {hook_event_name, tool_name, tool_input:{command,description?}}. Fires only when the bash command starts with 'git commit'.
hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in "git commit"*) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run lint && npm run typecheck) 1>&2 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"pre-commit lint/typecheck failed; fix before committing"}'; exit 0; } ;; *) ;; esac

hooks.description: Warn before bash commands that touch protected paths (migrations/, tests/invariants/, audit/). Stdin same as above.
hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *migrations/*|*tests/invariants/*|*audit_records*) echo '{"systemMessage":"PROTECTED PATH: command touches migrations/, tests/invariants/, or audit_records. RLS policies + audit append-only invariants apply (I-003, I-023, I-027). Confirm you have spec citation before continuing."}' ;; *) ;; esac

hooks.description: Secret scanner. Stdin: {hook_event_name, tool_name, tool_input:{file_path, content?|new_string?}}. Scans for common API key shapes and blocks the write if found.
hooks.command: PAYLOAD=$(jq -r '[.tool_input.content // "", .tool_input.new_string // ""] | join("\n")'); MATCH=$(printf '%s' "$PAYLOAD" | grep -E -i -o '(sk-(ant|live|test)-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|aws_secret_access_key\s*=\s*[A-Za-z0-9/+=]{30,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|xox[baprs]-[A-Za-z0-9-]{10,}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{30,}|ghs_[A-Za-z0-9]{30,}|github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{50,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |OPENSSH |EC |DSA |PGP )?PRIVATE KEY-----|postgres(ql)?:\/\/[^\s:]+:[^\s@]+@)' | head -1); if [ -n "$MATCH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Secret-shape detected in file content. Move to environment variable or secrets manager and reference via process.env.* — never commit credentials."}'; fi

hooks.description: Migration reminder. Stdin: {hook_event_name, tool_name, tool_input:{file_path,...}}. Fires only when path matches migrations/*.sql.
hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *migrations/*.sql|*migrations\\*.sql) echo '{"systemMessage":"Migration touched. Run: npm run migrate:diff. If you created a tenant-scoped table, verify: (1) tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id), (2) ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, (3) tenant_isolation policy. See skill migration-with-rls. (I-023, I-027.)"}' ;; *) ;; esac

hooks.description: Tenant-scoped table RLS check. Re-reads the migration file and warns if tenant_id is present without ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *migrations/*.sql|*migrations\\*.sql) if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then HAS_TID=$(grep -E -i 'tenant_id' "$FILE" | head -1); HAS_RLS=$(grep -E -i 'ENABLE\s+ROW\s+LEVEL\s+SECURITY' "$FILE" | head -1); if [ -n "$HAS_TID" ] && [ -z "$HAS_RLS" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: migration declares tenant_id but no ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY found. I-023 requires three-layer isolation. Add ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE ... FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ... See skill migration-with-rls."}'; fi; fi ;; *) ;; esac

hooks.description: OpenAPI validate. Fires on Write/Edit to **/openapi*.{yaml,yml,json}.
hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *openapi*.yaml|*openapi*.yml|*openapi*.json) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run openapi:validate) 1>&2 || echo '{"systemMessage":"openapi:validate failed or not yet wired. See package.json scripts."}' ;; *) ;; esac

env.TELECHECK_SPEC_PATH: ../telecheckONE/Telecheck Master Bundle FINAL US REGION BASELINE
